summary: CRITICAL: Test fixtures (fixtures/test-case-*.json) are missing entirely—the task explicitly requires "Create mock commit logs as test fixtures," but workflow references non-existent fixture files, causing immediate failure. Workflow test steps 1-4 (lines 32-67) are nearly identical—violate DRY; should use matrix strategy to eliminate ~35 lines of duplication. TypeScript code is excellent (proper types, error handling, clear structure). run-act-tests.ts has repetitive assertion blocks (lines 93-107) that should loop. Actionlint/Bun reinstalled every run; missing caching. Without fixtures, act tests cannot run and act-result.txt artifact cannot be generated, failing core requirement.
